description: Sample dataset for testing JSON parsing in ingestion pipeline. This file is intentionally large to exceed the 512 character threshold and to test multi-chunk splitting behavior in downstream processing systems.

data.text: This is a long sample entry used to increase file size and simulate real-world payloads in ingestion pipelines.
Another extended text block to ensure the JSON file exceeds the required threshold for testing purposes.
Additional filler content to guarantee that the parser handles larger JSON structures correctly.

notes: The purpose of this file is purely for testing. It should be parsed as a single text chunk if under threshold logic is bypassed, or split depending on implementation.
